title: RFC 2119 / 8174 normative keyword capitalization
notes: Bridge case from recovered legacy line. Failure shape: unsupported critical step where lowercase must is treated as normative without BCP-14 capitalization / invocation check.

title: PEP 621 required vs dynamic metadata
notes: Bridge case from recovered legacy line. Failure shape: missing field treated as non-conformant without checking dynamic semantics.

title: Declaration adoption vs signing
notes: Dependency-chain case. Later signing claim must not ride on adoption retrieval without a distinct engrossment/signing step.

title: Magna Carta definitive version
notes: Retrieval-sensitive case. Generic 1215 retrieval is insufficient for the definitive-version framing; plan must reach a source distinguishing 1215 from 1225.

title: FDA 510(k) substantial-equivalence defensibility
notes: Defensibility case. Recommendation must surface intended-use, technological-characteristics, and new-questions-of-safety/effectiveness steps explicitly.

title: GDPR legitimate-interests three-part test
notes: Defensibility case. Recommendation must surface purpose, necessity, and balancing as distinct justified steps.
